Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class GenerationResourceBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerationResourceBuilder
  • public class GenerationResourceBuilder
extends Object
    Builder class for constructing GenerateContentRequest objects. This builder provides a fluent and intuitive API for configuring all aspects of the request, including nested objects and lists.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  GenerationResourceBuilder.GenerationResourceBuilderBuilder  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequest build()
      Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance based on the configured parameters.
      static GenerationResourceBuilder.GenerationResourceBuilderBuilder builder()  
      GenerationResourceBuilder withCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
      Sets the optional cached content name for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withGeminiClient​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Sets the required Gemini client for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
      Sets the optional generation configuration for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
      Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withSystemInstruction​(String systemInstruction)
      Sets the optional system instructions for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
      Sets the optional tool configuration for the generation request.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withToolFunctionDeclaration​(String name, String description, TypeEnum type, String format, String descriptionSchema, Boolean nullable, List<String> enumValues, Schema items)
      Adds a function declaration to the list of function declarations for the tool.
      GenerationResourceBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
      Sets the required user input for the generation request.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • withGeminiClient

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withGeminiClient​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
        Sets the required Gemini client for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        geminiClient - The Gemini client to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withUserInput

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
        Sets the required user input for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        userInput - The user's input text.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSystemInstruction

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withSystemInstruction​(String systemInstruction)
        Sets the optional system instructions for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        systemInstruction - The system instructions to guide the model's response.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withToolFunctionDeclaration

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withToolFunctionDeclaration​(String name,
                                                             String description,
                                                             TypeEnum type,
                                                             String format,
                                                             String descriptionSchema,
                                                             Boolean nullable,
                                                             List<String> enumValues,
                                                             Schema items)
        Adds a function declaration to the list of function declarations for the tool.
        Parameters:
        name - The name of the function.
        description - A brief description of the function.
        type - The data type of the function parameter.
        format - The format of the data type.
        descriptionSchema - A description of the function parameter schema.
        nullable - Whether the function parameter can be null.
        enumValues - Possible values of the function parameter if it's an enum.
        items - The schema for the items in an array parameter.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withToolConfig

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
        Sets the optional tool configuration for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        toolConfig - The tool configuration to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSafetySetting

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
        Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        safetySetting - The safety setting to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withGenerationConfig

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
        Sets the optional generation configuration for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        generationConfig - The generation configuration to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withCachedContent

        public GenerationResourceBuilder withCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
        Sets the optional cached content name for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        cachedContent - The name of the cached content to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • build

        public GenerateContentRequest build()
        Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built GenerateContentRequest instance.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - If the user input is not set.

      • builder

        public static GenerationResourceBuilder.GenerationResourceBuilderBuilder builder()
